description: The West End Gang is a powerful criminal organization based in Montreal, Quebec, active since the early 1900s. It is recognized as part of the Irish mafia, with close ties to the Winter Hill Gang in Boston and alliances with the Rizzuto and Musitano crime families. The gang engages in theft, robbery, kidnapping, fraud, arms trafficking, and drug dealing, notably controlling cocaine and hashish distribution in the 1970s. It was part of the Consorzio, a drug cartel with Italian-Canadian families and Hells Angels. Current membership is estimated at 100-150, and the gang remains active under boss Gerald Matticks.

country_links.evidence_quote: la droga veniva distribuita in tutti gli Stati Uniti ed il Canada
country_links.context: The West End Gang distributed drugs throughout the United States via the Consorzio cartel.
